title: Grilled Jamaican Nectarine Salad
description: A sweet and savory salad made with grilled nectarines, a hint of Jamaican spice, and a tangy sour dressing.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix together sour cream, silky honey, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Brush the sliced nectarines with a little water and sprinkle with Jamaican jerk seasoning.
Grill the nectarines for 2-3 minutes per side, or until slightly charred.
Let the nectarines cool slightly, then cut into bite-sized pieces.
In a large bowl, combine the grilled nectarines, curry powder, and a few tablespoons of the sour cream dressing.
Toss gently to combine, then serve immediately.
